name: Nada Emad Mahmoud

projects.name: AI-Based Tourist Assistant
projects.description: Expanded an end-to-end AI-powered tourist assistant that extracts Arabic text from images using OCR, performs contextual Arabic-to-English translation with LLMs, detects landmarks and prices, and generates tourist recommendations.

projects.name: AI vs Human Text Detection
projects.description: Developed a system to classify Arabic text as AI-generated or human-written using NLP and machine learning.

projects.name: Sentiment Analysis of Movie Reviews
projects.description: Conducted sentiment analysis on movie reviews using machine learning techniques by classifying text as positive or negative.

summary: Motivated and dedicated Computer Science graduate seeking an opportunity to contribute to a dynamic and growth-oriented organization.
